examples: Well, just as you can’t trust a killer, how can you trust his hirer?
I needed to change my position to being a hirer and mentor and compensator.
Where the hiree sustains any loss due to reasons such as the hirer's delay in responding, etc., the hirer shall pay damages.
Once I've selected the one I want the system constructs a contract between myself and the hirer.
They may also wish to obtain more information from the hirer at the outset about the working conditions in force.
